title: Department Manager Vacancy at MTR Foods - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at MTR Foods - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
MTR Foods is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MTR Foods:
MTR Foods is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
